cards.name: Bamboo Dojo
cards.description: A peaceful dojo built deep within a bamboo grove where young karate dogs begin their training.

cards.name: First Bow
cards.description: Every GoJitsu student begins with a bow. It's not about strength, it's about respect for your opponent and the path of discipline.

cards.name: Paw Punch Practice
cards.description: The training dummies in the dojo courtyard have seen thousands of punches. Some strikes land perfectly. Others wobble the dummy sideways. But every punch brings a student one step closer to becoming a true GoJitsu fighter.

cards.name: Quiet Meditation
cards.description: Even the most energetic karate dogs must learn patience. Sitting still, breathing slowly, and calming the mind is sometimes the hardest lesson of all. Sensei says a quiet mind strikes faster than a busy one.

cards.name: Balance Training
cards.description: Standing steady on one paw is no easy task, especially when the bamboo poles sway in the wind. But mastering balance means mastering your body, and that can make the difference in any match.

cards.name: Kick Drill Line
cards.description: High kicks! Low kicks! Spin kicks! The dojo fills with the sound of paws thumping the air as students practice their forms. Sometimes a kick lands perfectly… and sometimes it almost knocks over a neighbor.

cards.name: Bamboo Strike
cards.description: A well-trained strike can split bamboo cleanly in two. Students practice again and again, learning that strength alone isn’t enough. Precision and timing are what make a strike truly powerful.

cards.name: Sensei's Whistle
cards.description: When Sensei blows the whistle, every student freezes instantly, even if they’re halfway through a jump kick. It’s a reminder that discipline means listening as much as fighting.

cards.name: Rolling Practice
cards.description: Falling down happens to every student. The important part is getting back up quickly. Rolling practice teaches karate dogs how to tumble safely and land on their paws again.

cards.name: Patience Lesson
cards.description: The dojo sand timer trickles slowly while students sit quietly beside it. Waiting can feel harder than any training exercise. But patience is a skill every GoJitsu master must learn.

cards.name: Respect the Dojo
cards.description: Before every lesson, students sweep the floors, tidy the mats, and make sure the dojo is ready. Sensei says a clean dojo helps create a clear mind.

cards.name: Mountain Training Hall
cards.description: High in the mountains, where the wind howls and the air grows thin, the Mountain Training Hall stands strong. Students who train here say the climb alone makes their legs stronger.

cards.name: Waterfall Yard
cards.description: The roar of the waterfall echoes across the training yard. Sparring here teaches students to focus even when the world around them is loud and wild.

cards.name: Lantern Courtyard
cards.description: When the sun sets, the dojo courtyard glows with warm lantern light. Evening training sessions here are quiet, focused, and full of determination.

cards.name: Cherry Blossom Garden
cards.description: Petals drift softly through the air as students train beneath the cherry trees. Sensei often says the blossoms remind us that patience and dedication can create beautiful things.

cards.name: Training Bridge
cards.description: The narrow wooden bridge leaves little room for mistakes. Sparring here teaches balance, courage, and the importance of steady paws.

cards.name: Stone Dojo Steps
cards.description: Every morning, students climb the ancient stone steps leading to the dojo. By the time they reach the top, their legs are already warmed up for training.

cards.name: Hidden Forest Clearing
cards.description: Sometimes the best dojo has no walls at all. In the quiet forest clearing, students train surrounded by tall trees and chirping birds.

cards.name: Riverbank Arena
cards.description: Matches beside the rushing river are exciting—but slippery footing means fighters must stay sharp. This is a place for those who want to push their limits.

cards.name: Snow Dojo
cards.description: Training in the snow tests both determination and balance. Cold paws don’t stop dedicated students from practicing their forms.

cards.name: Eager Pup
cards.description: Every dojo has one student who can’t wait to start training. This eager pup throws punches with enthusiasm, even if the form still needs a little work.

cards.name: Serious Student
cards.description: Focused and determined, the Serious Student trains harder than anyone else in the dojo. For them, every lesson is a step toward mastery.

cards.name: The Dojo Helper
cards.description: Not every lesson happens on the mat. Some students help sweep floors, organize equipment, and prepare the dojo for training.

cards.name: Headband Champion
cards.description: The red headband is worn by those who train with courage and perseverance. Many students dream of earning one of their own.

cards.name: Clumsy Beginner
cards.description: Everyone starts somewhere. Even the most skilled masters once tripped over their own paws during their first lessons.

cards.name: Friendly Rival
cards.description: A good rival pushes you to improve. After every match, these two competitors share a respectful bow, and sometimes a laugh!

cards.name: Wise Sensei
cards.description: Sensei rarely raises his voice. Instead, he teaches through quiet words, patient guidance, and the occasional perfectly timed demonstration.

cards.name: The Fast One
cards.description: Blink and you might miss this fighter’s move. Speed is their greatest strength, but Sensei reminds them that control matters too.

cards.name: Strong Student
cards.description: Powerful strikes can break boards and split bamboo. But true strength also means knowing when to hold back.

cards.name: The Jokester
cards.description: Training can be serious work, but the dojo always has room for laughter. This student’s silly poses keep everyone smiling.

cards.name: Friendly Sparring
cards.description: Not every match is about winning. Friendly sparring gives students a chance to practice their techniques while helping each other grow stronger.

cards.name: Lightning Kick
cards.description: Fast as a flash of lightning, this kick strikes before most opponents can react. Speed like this only comes from hours of careful training.

cards.name: Twin Paw Strike
cards.description: Some moves require perfect coordination. The Twin Paw Strike uses both paws at once to surprise an opponent who expects only one.

cards.name: Swift Dodge
cards.description: The best defense isn’t always blocking. Sometimes the smartest move is stepping aside and letting the attack pass harmlessly by.

cards.name: Spinning Kick
cards.description: A spinning kick takes balance, timing, and courage. Done correctly, it can surprise even the most experienced fighters.

cards.name: Flying Kick
cards.description: Some fighters prefer to keep their paws on the ground. Others leap into the air and strike from above.

cards.name: Paw Block
cards.description: A strong block can stop even the fiercest attack. Students learn early that good defense is just as important as offense.

cards.name: Final Strike
cards.description: After a long match, one carefully timed strike can decide everything. The trick is staying calm until that moment arrives.

cards.name: Backflip Escape
cards.description: When trouble comes too close, sometimes the best move is a quick flip out of the way.

cards.name: Victory Bow
cards.description: At the end of every match, both fighters bow. Whether they won or lost, respect for the opponent always comes first.

cards.name: Snack Break
cards.description: Training works up an appetite! After a long lesson, the dojo kitchen fills with hungry students enjoying dumplings and rice bowls.

cards.name: Dropped Belt
cards.description: Someone forgot to tie their belt properly! During an energetic spin kick, the belt slips loose and sends its owner tumbling.

cards.name: Mud Training
cards.description: Rain turned the training yard into a muddy mess. Sensei says that learning to fight in slippery conditions builds strong balance.

cards.name: Dojo Nap
cards.description: Meditation is important… but sometimes a sleepy student drifts a little too far into dreamland.

cards.name: Over-Excited Kick
cards.description: Some students train with so much excitement they forget to slow down. This spinning kick may have started strong—but the landing needs work.

cards.name: Chasing Leaves
cards.description: Autumn leaves blow through the courtyard while students try to stay focused. Not everyone succeeds.

cards.name: Training Dummy Double
cards.description: The training dummy has endured thousands of punches… but this one might have been a little too strong.

cards.name: Puppy Pile
cards.description: A playful sparring match ends in a cheerful tumble of paws and tails. Even serious training days have moments of fun.

cards.name: Lantern Mishap
cards.description: A high kick and a hanging lantern don’t always mix well. Luckily, the lantern only wobbled instead of falling.

cards.name: The Loud One
cards.description: Some fighters believe every move should be shouted at full volume. The entire dojo hears this student’s training sessions.

cards.name: Rising Sun Dojo
cards.description: As the sun rises over the mountains, the dojo doors slide open and another day of training begins.

cards.name: Storm Training
cards.description: Thunder rumbles and rain pours down, but the training never stops. Sensei says tough weather builds tougher fighters.

cards.name: Full Moon Practice
cards.description: Under the glow of the full moon, advanced students train quietly in the courtyard.

cards.name: Windy Mountain Path
cards.description: The path to the mountain dojo twists through strong winds. Every step tests balance and determination.

cards.name: Torchlit Arena
cards.description: Special matches are sometimes held at night, lit by tall torches around the training arena.

cards.name: Foggy Morning
cards.description: A thick fog settles across the dojo grounds. Students must rely on their instincts when they can’t see clearly.

cards.name: Autumn Training Day
cards.description: Golden leaves swirl through the courtyard as students practice their forms. The season changes, but training continues.

cards.name: Winter Discipline
cards.description: Snow blankets the dojo steps, but dedicated students still gather for practice.

cards.name: Summer Heat Training
cards.description: The summer sun beats down on the training yard. Sweat drips from tired students—but none of them quit.

cards.name: Silent Dojo Night
cards.description: When training ends, the dojo becomes quiet. Tomorrow will bring another day of lessons.

cards.name: Master's Lesson
cards.description: The most important lesson in GoJitsu isn’t about fighting. It’s learning when fighting isn’t necessary.

cards.name: Perfect Form
cards.description: A flawless stance may look simple, but mastering it takes years of dedication.

cards.name: The Final Test
cards.description: Every advanced student must face the final test: a match judged by Sensei himself.

cards.name: Dojo Tournament
cards.description: Students gather from many dojos to compete in the great GoJitsu tournament.

cards.name: Black Belt
cards.description: Few students ever earn the Black Belt. Those who do have proven their discipline, courage, and respect.

cards.name: Calm Before the Storm
cards.description: Before every tournament match, fighters take a quiet moment to steady their breath.

cards.name: Master Strike
cards.description: A single strike delivered with perfect timing can end a match instantly.

cards.name: True Discipline
cards.description: The strongest fighters aren’t always the loudest or fastest. Sometimes they’re the calmest.

cards.name: The Dojo Spirit
cards.description: Training together builds more than strength. It builds friendship, respect, and the spirit of the dojo.

cards.name: Path of the Karate Dog
cards.description: The journey of GoJitsu never truly ends. Each lesson leads to another, and every student walks their own path toward mastery.
